---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Trajectory
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the problem you're trying to solve

<!-- Describe the situation, not the solution. "I can't easily X" or
"every time I do Y, Z is annoying." Helps us understand whether the
proposed feature is the best fit. -->

## What would you like to happen

<!-- Concrete description of the proposed behaviour. UI sketches,
referenced screenshots, or comparisons to other apps welcome. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought of, and why they don't fit. Optional
but useful — saves a back-and-forth on "have you tried X?" -->

## How does this fit Trajectory's scope

<!-- Trajectory is an equipment-first, single-author, self-hosted
workout tracker. Features that drift from that posture (cloud sync,
social, gamification, marketplace) are unlikely to land — call out if
your proposal is a stretch so we can talk scope upfront. -->

## Anything else

<!-- Edge cases, related issues, willingness to contribute a PR. -->
